_comment: Versioned-pin manifest for az-ai v2.0.4. Install with `scoop install schwartzkamel/az-ai@2.0.4`. Frozen at v2.0.4 — SHA256 below is the digest of the v2.0.4 GitHub Release artifact (run 24789065975, published 2026-04-22) and never changes once filled at tag time. No checkver/autoupdate on versioned manifests by design. v2.0.4 drops macOS Intel (osx-x64) from the release matrix and ships FDR High-severity fixes; v2.0.3 was tagged but the binary-matrix publish was cancelled at cutover (no GitHub Release for 2.0.3). Tarball-filename drift (audit finding C-1): the v2.0.4 zip was uploaded as `az-ai-v2-2.0.2-win-x64.zip` because packaging/tarball/stage.sh VERSION was not rolled past 2.0.2 in the v2.0.3/v2.0.4 commits; URL hardcodes the literal filename.
description: Azure OpenAI CLI — AOT agent with Microsoft Agent Framework, personas/squads, cost estimator (pinned to v2.0.4)
post_install: Write-Host 'az-ai v2.0.4 (pinned) installed. Third-party notices bundled next to the binary:'
